Requirement / Constraint: WTIMER_Delay(ms) blocks for specified milliseconds at 1 ms timer resolution
UART0_Init() initializes UART0 at a chosen baud rate except 57600
UART0_SendChar(c) sends a single character to the serial terminal
UART0_SendString(s) sends a single string to the serial terminal
UART0_SendInteger(n) sends a integer as a decimal string
UART0_SendFloat(f, decimal) sets a float to a certain precision
I2C_Init() initializes I2C1-3 at 100 kHz with three slave devices (Needs 4.7k? resistors on SDA and SCL)
I2C_Write(addr, reg, data) write single byte to a slave register
I2C_Read(addr, reg, count, buffer) read multiple bytes from a slave register
TCS34725_Init() Initializes sensor, detects via ID register 0x12 returns 0x44
TCS34725_Enable() turns on color sensing via ENABLE register 0x80
TCS34725_ReadColor(r, g, b) reads 16 bit rgb values 0x94-99
MPU6050_Init():Initialize sensor
MPU6050_Enable(): Config & enable measurements
MPU6050_ReadAccel(ax, ay, az): Read 3-axis acceleration
MPU6050_ReadGyro(gx, gy, gz): Read 3-axis rotation
LCD_Init(): Init LCD
LCD_PrintText(text): Display text on LCD
LCD_SetCursor(row, col): Position cursor
LCD_Clear(): Clear display & home cursor
Servo_Init(): Configure PWM at 50 Hz frequency
Servo_SetAngle(angle): Set servo to specified angle(-90 to +90)
LED_Init(): Initialize PortF GPIO for LEDS
BTN_Init(): Intialize PortF GPIO for input on PF4 & PF0 config pull up resistors for SW1 & SW2
